data.name: My wife is a porn star
data.detailed_description:
You will play the role of a husband whose wife has become a porn actress. Go all the way to popularity and fame together with your wife.

In the game you will find:
- One-handed play
- Hot sex stories
- 3 hot chicks
- Ocean of passion and love.

The game has minimal boring scenes and solid porn scenes.

Discover unseen horizons with your wife in the world of porn business!
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: My wife is a porn star is a visual novel in which you have to play the role of a porn star's husband.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 589 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 589 MB 可用空間
